news.headline: Southern Energy is securing financing to boost liquids-rich gas production in Gulf Coast, catering to rising U.S. natural gas demand. Please note the announcement is restricted in certain regions.
news.summary: The statement and accompanying details are confidential and not intended for dissemination in the United States, Australia, Japan, New Zealand, South Africa, or any other jurisdiction where such action is prohibited by law. Please refrain from releasing, publishing, or distributing this information in any form within these regions.

news.headline: OKX obtains MiFID II license in Europe, paving the way for derivatives trading expansion across EU markets. Volume: $3.7B on March 12.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency exchange OKX has obtained a Markets in Financial Instruments Directive (MiFID II) license in the European Union, expanding its services to offer derivatives products for institutional investors across the region. This acquisition follows a preauthorization under the Markets in Crypto-Assets (MiCA) framework, allowing OKX to operate in 28 markets within the European Economic Area. OKX, based in Seychelles, processed nearly $3.7 billion in spot trades on March 12, making it one of the largest exchanges. The demand for cryptocurrency derivatives is rapidly increasing, with the centralized market reaching nearly $7 trillion as per a November report by CCData. An EY report from February 2024 predicts continued growth in the crypto derivatives market, driven by the evolution of decentralized finance (DeFi). Kraken securing its MiFID license also highlights Europe as a significant region for crypto derivatives trading, with CME Group identifying it as the world's second-largest cryptocurrency economy, representing 18% of global transaction volumes.

news.headline: Green Plains Inc. will be at the 37th Annual ROTH Conference on Mar. 17, 2025, at 9 a.m. Pacific Time. Executives will participate in a fireside chat with institutional investors. Live webcast and replay accessible.
news.summary: Green Plains Inc. stated that their CFO, Phil Boggs, and Executive VP of Operations and Technology, Chris Osowski, are set to take part in a fireside chat at the 37th Annual ROTH Conference on Mar. 17, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. PT (11:00 a.m. CT). The company will also engage in discussions with institutional investors during the event. A live webcast and replay will be available for those interested.

news.headline: Mustang Energy Corp. emphasizes its milestones in 2025, highlighting responsible exploration and sustainable development.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on March 12, 2025, Mustang Energy Corp. (CSE: MEC, OTC: MECPF, FRA:92T) shared a detailed summary of its key accomplishments in 2025, emphasizing its dedication to eco-friendly exploration and sustainable growth in uranium and critical minerals.

news.headline: Propel achieved record results in Q4 2024 and FY 2024: Revenue increased by 35% to $129.3M in Q4 and by 42% to $449.7M for the fiscal year. Adjusted EBITDA increased by 48% to $31.9M in Q4 and by 60% to $121.3M for the fiscal year. Net income increased by 37% to $11.6M in Q4 and by 67% to $46.4M for the fiscal year. Loans and Advances Receivable increased by 45% in Q4 to $375.2M, while Ending Combined Loan and Advance Balances reached a record $480.6M. Dividend increased by 7% in Q4 2024. Management is optimistic about growth in the US, Canada, and the UK markets.
news.summary: Propel Holdings Inc. reported on its financial performance for Q4 2024 and fiscal year 2024, with notable increases in revenue, adjusted EBITDA, net income, and more. Revenue increased by 35% to $129.3 million in Q4 2024 and by 42% to $449.7 million for fiscal 2024. Adjusted EBITDA saw a 48% increase in Q4 2024 to $31.9 million and a 60% increase for fiscal 2024 to $121.3 million. Net income increased by 37% to $11.6 million in Q4 2024 and by 67% to $46.4 million for fiscal 2024. Loans and Advances Receivable increased by 45% in Q4 2024 to $375.2 million. Additionally, Propel's AI-powered technology saw strong credit performance, with provisions for loan losses decreasing to 51% in Q4 2024 from 54% in Q4 2023. The integration of acquired business QuidMarket performed well, contributing to Propel's growth strategy. Targets for 2025 include further revenue growth and margin expansion. Management expresses confidence in continued growth and expansion in the US, Canada, and the UK markets.

news.headline: 2024 revenue increased in Q4 and full year by OTC Markets Group, as per report.

OTC Markets Group saw $111.1M in gross revenues in 2024, up 1% from 2023, with net income of $27.4M and a dividend of $0.18 per share. 567 OTCQX® and 1,050 OTCQB® companies listed. 43 graduated to a national securities exchange in 2024. 114 OTC Link ECN subscribers and 141 OTC Link subscribers. Approximately 38,000 average daily trades in 2024. They will launch OTCIDTM market in July 2025. New offerings include OTC OvernightTM and MOON ATSTM. Operating income was $32.2M for the year and gross revenues in Q4 were $28.5M, up 3% from the prior year quarter.
news.summary: OTC Markets Group Inc. reported financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. Highlights include gross revenues of $111.1 million for the year, a 1% increase from 2023, and operating income of $32.2 million for the year, a 1% decrease from 2023. Net income for 2024 was $27.4 million, down 1% from 2023, with a GAAP diluted EPS of $2.26. The company returned $29.5 million to shareholders in 2024. OTC Markets Group also announced various new offerings and initiatives, including the launch of OTCID in July 2025. There were 567 OTCQX and 1,050 OTCQB companies at year-end and 43 graduates to a national securities exchange during 2024. There were 38,000 average daily trades in 2024 versus 32,000 in 2023. Operating income for the fourth quarter was $8.8 million, flat compared to the prior year quarter, with an operating profit margin of 31.6%. Market Data Licensing revenues were steady, Corporate Services revenues declined, and operating expenses increased slightly.Adjusted EBITDA increased 2% to $11.0 million for the quarter. For the full year of 2024, gross revenues were $111.1 million, up 1% from 2023, and operating income was $32.2 million, down 1% from 2023, with an operating profit margin of 29.9%.

news.headline: ACTFL supports US Department of Education amid drastic staff cuts; nearly half eliminated on White House directive.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, in Alexandria, Virginia, the American Council on the Teaching of Foreign Languages (ACTFL) strongly denounces the decision made by the United States Department of Education, per White House orders, to reduce almost 50% of its workforce. This announcement was made on March 11, 2025. ACTFL expresses firm opposition to this action and offers support to those affected.

news.headline: Kewaunee Scientific (NASDAQ: KEQU) amends share repurchase program on March 12, 2025.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Kewaunee Scientific Corporation in Statesville, North Carolina, updated its share repurchase program. The Board of Directors approved an amendment to the program, with Kewaunee Scientific Corporation identified as (NASDAQ: KEQU). This change is intended to enhance shareholder value and demonstrates the company's commitment to its financial strategy. The specific details and extent of the amendment were not provided in the announcement.

news.headline: Armata secures $10M credit agreement with Innoviva to advance phage product candidates. - March 12, 2025.
news.summary: Armata Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NYSE American: ARMP), a clinical-stage biotechnology company, is set to utilize the proceeds to further advance the development of Armata's phage product candidates. This news was disclosed in Los Angeles on March 12, 2025.

news.headline: VerticalScope reports double-digit growth in revenue, Adjusted EBITDA, and cash flow in Q4 2024. TSX:FORA; OTCQX:VFORF.
news.summary: VerticalScope Holdings Inc., a technology firm trading as FORA on the Toronto Stock Exchange and VFORF on the OTCQX, disclosed its financial performance for Q4 2024. The company, based in Toronto, specializes in creating and managing cloud-based digital forums for niche interest groups. The revenue for the quarter ended December 31, 2024, saw a significant double-digit organic growth. The CEO expressed pride in the achievements of the team throughout the year and noted substantial enhancements to the company's financial standing.

news.headline: UiPath (NYSE: PATH) Q4 earnings beat at 9 cents/share, revenues of $424M missed; stock plunges. Trump Media & Technology also sees 50% drop.
news.summary: UiPath, Inc. (NYSE:PATH) disclosed its Q4 results post Wednesday's market close. Breaking it down, the company posted earnings of nine cents per share, surpassing the estimated three cents by analysts. Revenue for the quarter stood at $424 million, slightly lower than the expected $425.36 million but higher than the previous year's figure of $405.25 million. This update comes amid Trump Media & Technology Stock experiencing a 50% drop since Inauguration Day. For a more comprehensive read, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Groupon (GRPN) shares rise after reporting Q4 revenue of $130.38m, higher than estimated $127.74m. Loss per share at $1.20.
news.summary: Shares of Groupon Inc. (NASDAQ:GRPN) saw an increase in trading on Wednesday following the release of its fourth-quarter report. The company exceeded expectations with revenue reaching $130.38 million, surpassing the estimated $127.74 million. Despite a 4% decrease in revenue compared to the previous year, the results were boosted by a rebound in unit sales and cash flow generation. However, Groupon also reported a fourth-quarter loss of $1.20 per share, which was higher than the expected loss of four cents per share.

news.headline: SCYNEXIS reported financial results for full year 2024 with $75.1M cash, aiming cash runway into Q3 2026. Expecting Phase 1 trial results for SCY-247 in Q3 2025. Plans to restart Phase 3 MARIO study in Q2 2025 pending FDA's clinical hold lift. Revenue decreased to $3.7M in 2024 from $139.1M in 2023. Net loss for 2024 was $21.3M vs. net income of $67.0M in 2023.
news.summary: SCYNEXIS, a biotech company, reported financial results for the year ended December 31, 2024. Their Phase 1 trial of the antifungal SCY-247 began in December 2024 with results expected in Q3 2025. They presented preclinical data at various conferences in 2024 and have more planned for 2025. They anticipate restarting the Phase 3 MARIO study in the second quarter of 2025 pending FDA approval. The company ended 2024 with $75.1 million in cash, expecting funds into Q3 2026. Revenue for 2024 was $3.7 million, less than 2013's $130.1 million. Research and development expenses decreased to $26.4 million, and SG&A expenses dropped to $14.5 million. They reported a net loss of $21.3 million in 2024. SCYNEXIS is focused on developing triterpenoid antifungals like SCY-247 to address drug-resistant infections. They are pioneering innovative medicines to combat these challenging infections.

news.headline: SCYNEXIS reports full-year 2024 financial results, focuses on drug-resistant infections.
news.summary: Jersey City, New Jersey - On March 12, 2025, SCYNEXIS, Inc. disclosed its financial performance for the year ending December 31, 2024. The biotechnology firm, listed under NASDAQ as SCYX, is known for developing groundbreaking medications to combat and forestall challenging-to-treat and drug-resistant infections.

news.headline: Caliber in Scottsdale released supplemental financial info on asset management platform, giving investors 5 years data.
news.summary: Caliber, based in Scottsdale, Arizona, announced its supplemental financial results for the asset management platform business, offering investors access to five years of historical data.

news.headline: Pine Street Inn and The Community Builders unveil "The Lyndia" in Boston's Jamaica Plain - 202-unit building with 140 units for homeless and 62 for income-eligible families.
news.summary: In Boston, Pine Street Inn and The Community Builders unveiled "The Lyndia," a new 202-unit building in Jamaica Plain. Out of these units, 140 are designated for individuals transitioning out of homelessness, marking the largest supportive housing project in New England. Additionally, 62 apartments are reserved for families who meet income eligibility criteria. The grand opening ceremony took place today, showcasing a significant step towards addressing homelessness and affordable housing needs in the region.

news.headline: MAC Copper Limited has improved liquidity and lowered interest rate by repaying $145 million mezzanine facility.
news.summary: In St. Helier, Jersey, MAC Copper Limited (NYSE: MTAL; ASX: MAC) has made an important announcement regarding its debt restructuring. The company has effectively amended its debt structure by repaying the Sprott mezzanine facility. Prior to this update, MAC's debt facilities included a US$159 million term loan, an unused US$25 million revolving credit line, a US$145 million mezzanine facility. The move aims to streamline the company's balance sheet and enhance its financial position.

news.headline: Central 1 Credit Union reports strong financial performance with total revenue of $302.9 million in 2024, an increase from last year.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on March 12, 2025, Central 1 Credit Union (Central 1) released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The report showcased impressive performance with total revenue reaching $302.9 million for the year, signifying a significant rise from the previous year.

news.headline: WillScot priced a private offering of $500 million in senior secured notes due 2030 at 6.625%. Closing expected by March 26, 2025.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, WillScot Holdings Corporation disclosed the pricing details of a private offering, where its subsidiary WSI will issue $500.0 million in 6.625% senior secured notes due 2030. The notes were valued at 100% of face value. The completion of this offering is anticipated around March 26, 2025, pending standard closing requirements. WillScot, known for temporary space solutions, traded on Nasdaq under the symbol WSC, is at the forefront of providing innovative solutions in this sector.

news.headline: DCM reports 2024 financial results, completes MCC acquisition, with strong performance in Q4 and fiscal year.
news.summary: DCM, a prominent Canadian print and digital solutions provider, announced their financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year of 2024. The company, listed on TSX as DCM and on OTCQX as DCMDF, highlighted the achievement of a significant milestone in completing the integration of the Moore Canada Corporation acquisition during this period. In 2024, DCM focused on simplifying complex marketing communications and workflow.

news.headline: Bitcoin & Ethereum slip, XRP & Dogecoin hold gains. XRP up 2.5% to $2.23, Bitcoin at $82,997.45 (-0.13%) & Ethereum at $1,876.24 (-3.7%).
news.summary: Bitcoin and Ethereum are facing challenges in maintaining their gains, with Bitcoin currently priced at $82,997.45, experiencing a slight decrease of 0.13%, and Ethereum at $1,876.24 with a decrease of 3.7%. On the other hand, XRP is rallying at $2.23, showing a positive increase of 2.5%. Solana is at $124.56, down by 2.1%, Dogecoin is at $0.1689 with a 1.3% increase, and Shiba Inu is at $0.00001229, up by 0.8%.Recent data from IntoTheBlock indicates that while large transaction volumes have increased by 5.2%, daily active addresses have fallen by 3.4%. Transactions exceeding $100,000 have decreased from 11,844 to 10,766 in a single day, and exchanges netflows are down by 100.9%. Coinglass data reveals that 97,058 traders were liquidated in the past 24 hours, totaling $281.42 million in losses.In notable developments, Binance has secured a $2 billion investment from Abu Dhabi MGX. The optimism surrounding XRP comes from the potential closure of the SEC case against Ripple, fueling its rally amidst the struggles of other major cryptocurrencies.

news.headline: Bird Construction reported $0.6 billion revenue growth in 2024, with 6.3% ADJ. EBITDA margin and affirmed 2025-2027 strategic plan targets.
news.summary: In 2024, Bird Construction saw remarkable growth in revenue and profitability with nearly $600 million in additional revenue and a 1.3% increase in Adjusted EBITDA Margin to 6.3%. These results are attributed to strategic changes made by the company, including diversifying the business, expanding capabilities and geographical reach, and balancing the work program with more collaborative contracting structures. President and CEO Teri McKibbon highlighted the company's economically resilient foundation, which has been established over the years to achieve the growth and profitability targets set for 2025-2027. Bird Construction's focus on key Canadian market sectors, a dedicated team, and a collaborative client approach are seen as factors that will help the company navigate potential impacts from economic and geopolitical uncertainty in the near term, while continuing to provide long-term value to shareholders.

news.headline: PROREIT reported stable NOI in Q4 & Fiscal 2024; sold 9 properties for $71.2M & acquired 1 for $32.7M. NOI up 3.9% in Q4 & 7.7% for Fiscal 2024; 90.9% of 2024 GLA renewed at 39.1% spread; Occupancy rate at 97.8%. Total debt $498.6M, decreased $16.7M; Adjusted Debt to Annualized Adjusted EBITDA Ratio 9.2x at Dec 31, 2024, down from 9.6x last year. Portfolio comprised 115 properties. Financially strong but AFFO Payout Ratio increased.
news.summary: PRO Real Estate Investment Trust (PROREIT) reported stable Net Operating Income (NOI) for Q4 and Fiscal 2024, despite owning 8 fewer properties. Same Property NOI increased by 3.9% in Q4 and 7.7% for Fiscal 2024. The REIT sold 9 non-strategic properties for $71.2 million and acquired one industrial property for $32.7 million in Fiscal 2024. Occupancy rate was at 97.8% at year-end. Total debt was $498.6 million at year-end, with a Debt to Asset ratio of 50.0%. Adjusted Debt to Annualized Adjusted EBITDA Ratio stood at 9.2x. The REIT's portfolio comprised 115 properties with over 86% in the industrial sector. AFFO was $28.8 million for fiscal year 2024 with a Payout Ratio of 94.6%. WALT for the portfolio was 3.8 years and increased to 4.6 years on pro forma basis. The REIT achieved strong leasing renewals for 2025 and 2026. In Fiscal 2024, PROREIT sold 9 owned properties for $71.2 million and acquired one industrial property for $32.7 million.

news.headline: Adobe beat Q1 revenue estimates with $5.71B, EPS beat at $5.08. Total revenue up 10% YoY. Cash flows at $2.48B.
news.summary: Adobe Inc (NASDAQ:ADBE) released their first-quarter financial results post-market on Wednesday. The report unveiled total revenue of $5.71 billion, surpassing the projected $5.66 billion. Adjusted earnings for the quarter stood at $5.08 per share, exceeding the expected $4.97 per share. Year-over-year, total revenue spiked by 10%, with digital media revenue increasing by 11% and digital experience revenue by 10%. Remaining performance obligations stood at $19.69 billion, while cash flows from operations reached $2.48 billion in Q1.

news.headline: Plastic surgery experts discuss rise in popularity of facelifts, achieving better results with innovative techniques.
news.summary: In Boston on March 12, 2025, facial plastic surgeons associated with the country's leading physician-run plastic surgery platform discussed the rising popularity of facelift procedures. They highlighted the increased demand for such surgeries, emphasizing the advancements in techniques that are now yielding enhanced, more natural-looking outcomes. The surgeons attributed the surge in interest in facelifts to a growing preference for aesthetic enhancements and shared their insights on how these improved techniques are transforming the field.

news.headline: Wan Bridge secures 5 new projects in Texas, enhancing its build-to-rent operations, focusing on AI-based Smart Construction.
news.summary: Houston-based Wan Bridge, a prominent build-to-rent developer, celebrates securing five major new projects, showcasing its strong growth and expansion in Texas. Recognized for its innovative approach, Wan Bridge has been chosen by various partners for its AI-driven Smart Construction method. This allows the company to construct homes efficiently and offer affordable housing solutions in Texas, catering to the state's burgeoning population.

news.headline: Allegion CFO Mike Wagnes to discuss long-term strategy at 2025 Bank of America Global Industrials Conference on March 19 in London. Webcast available at investor.allegion.com.
news.summary: A senior executive of Allegion plc (NYSE: ALLE) will be presenting the company's long-term strategy at the 2025 Bank of America Global Industrials Conference on March 19. The event will take place at The Landmark Hotel in London. Those interested can access a live listen-only webcast on Allegion’s investor website investor.allegion.com. Allegion, listed as NYSE: ALLE, is known for designing and manufacturing various products in the industry.

news.headline: Currency Exchange International reports $0.8 million net income for Q1 2025, 10% revenue increase compared to prior year.
news.summary: Currency Exchange International, Corp. (CXI) announced a net income of $0.8 million for Q1 2025, showing a 4% decrease from the previous year. The U.S. operations contributed $1.7 million in net income while Canada saw a net loss of $0.9 million. This quarter's results were affected by $0.3 million in third-party advisory costs for regulatory compliance with EBC. Adjusted net income, excluding this cost, rose by 29% compared to last year, with adjusted diluted EPS also up by 31%. Complete financial statements and MD&A are available on CXI's SEDAR profile at www.sedarplus.ca.

news.headline: Flagship Communities REIT reveals Q4 and full year 2024 performance data.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global economy is projected to grow by 5.6% this year, showing a significant increase from the previous forecast of 4.1%. The GDP growth in advanced economies is expected to reach 4.4% in 2022, while emerging market and developing economies are anticipated to grow by 6.3%. However, inflation rates are also on the rise, with consumer prices expected to surge by 3.4% in advanced economies and 5.8% in emerging markets. This surge in inflation is driven by higher energy and commodity prices, as well as supply chain disruptions. The report also highlighted the importance of policy actions to address these challenges and ensure sustainable and inclusive growth.

news.headline: ROHM Semiconductor will exhibit advanced power electronics at APEC 2025 in Atlanta from March 16-20.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California and Kyoto, Japan, on March 12, 2025, ROHM Semiconductor U.S.A., LLC revealed their involvement in APEC 2025, the leading power electronics conference. This event gathers professionals, scholars, and students globally. APEC 2025 is scheduled to take place in Atlanta, Georgia from March 16th to 20th, providing a platform for industry experts to convene and exchange ideas.

news.headline: China-based Farmmi, Inc. consolidates shares at 1-for-12 ratio after shareholder approval at annual meeting.
news.summary: In LISHUI, China on March 12, 2025, Farmmi, Inc. (NASDAQ: FAMI) revealed that during the annual general meeting on February 25, 2025, shareholders gave the green light to consolidate the Company's authorized shares by a ratio of one-for-twelve.

news.headline: Baijiayun Group Ltd appoints new independent directors, with Mr. Erlu Lin resigning.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Baijiayun Group Ltd revealed changes in its board of directors as Mr. Erlu Lin, an independent director, tendered his resignation. Baijiayun is a leading AI video solution provider traded on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol RTC. This change signifies a shift in leadership within the company's governance structure.

news.headline: Enstar Group Limited prices $350M 7.5% Fixed-Rate Reset Junior Subordinated Notes due 2045. Offering expected to close on March 18.
news.summary: Bermuda-based company Enstar Group Limited disclosed on March 12, 2025, that it has priced $350 million aggregate principal of its 7.500% Fixed-Rate Reset Junior Subordinated Notes due 2045. The Notes have been offered under Nasdaq as ESGR. This offering is set to be finalized on March 18, 2025, pending the fulfillment of standard closing requirements.

news.headline: Carpenter Technology stock's IBD Composite Rating climbs from 93 to 96, highlighting strong performance.
news.summary: On Wednesday, Carpenter Technology's IBD SmartSelect Composite Rating increased from 93 to 96. The rise in the stock's IBD Composite Rating was noted, reaching a score of 96.

news.headline: Adobe beat estimates for fiscal Q1, but gave mixed guidance for current quarter leading to stock fall.
news.summary: In the first quarter of its fiscal year, Adobe exceeded analyst expectations. However, the software firm provided a mixed outlook for the current quarter, causing its stock to decline in after-hours trading. Adobe's stock saw a decrease following the announcement.

news.headline: SentinelOne posts strong earnings but stock falls after forecasting weak revenue for fiscal Q1 2026.
news.summary: Shares of SentinelOne plummeted as the cybersecurity company provided a fiscal first quarter 2026 revenue forecast that was significantly lower than anticipated. Despite exceeding earnings estimates, the stock experienced a sharp decline in response to the weak revenue outlook. The disappointing guidance led to a substantial drop in the company's stock value. The post discussing SentinelOne's earnings outperforming projections and the subsequent market reaction was featured on Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: BTC dominance at 61.2%, up from 54% in Dec. Altcoin rally short-lived as BTC outperforms at $82,750. Fed's interest rates crucial for BTC rally.
news.summary: Bitcoin's dominance in the cryptocurrency market has reached a new high, standing at 61.2% as of March 12, up from a low of 54% in December. This surge highlights the short-lived nature of the recent altcoin rally, which lasted just a month. The Federal Reserve's decision to keep interest rates steady in January caused a drop in both stocks and cryptocurrencies, with Bitcoin trading at around $82,750 on March 12, down from its December peak of over $109,000. Traders have been shifting from altcoins to Bitcoin due to its outperformance during market decline. The future of Bitcoin's rally hinges on the Fed's decision regarding interest rates, with the recent drop in US inflation potentially influencing their next move. Markets anticipate the Fed to maintain rates at their upcoming meeting in March.

news.headline: Legacy Housing Corporation announces financial results for 2024.FullYearEnd revenue reached $200 million.
news.summary: In Bedford, Texas, on March 12, 2025, Legacy Housing Corporation, trading as NASDAQ: LEGH, revealed its financial performance for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2024.

news.headline: Top cryptocurrency by volume gains visibility during US tour, attracting attention of investors.
news.summary: A recent study reveals that the global population has reached 7.8 billion people, with over 220 million individuals suffering from hunger and malnutrition. The research highlights that nearly 690 million people are undernourished, with 135 million experiencing acute food insecurity. Furthermore, it indicates that around 3 billion individuals cannot afford a healthy diet, with the COVID-19 pandemic exacerbating food insecurity worldwide. Additionally, the report emphasizes that urgent action is needed to address these alarming statistics and ensure access to nutritious food for all.

news.headline: Churchill Downs Inc. authorizes new $500M share repurchase program, replaces prior program with $125.6M unused as of March 12, 2025. No time limit, may be suspended anytime.
news.summary: Louisville, Kentucky - Churchill Downs Incorporated (CDI) announced on March 12, 2025, that its Board of Directors has given the green light to a new $500 million share repurchase program. This initiative replaces the previous $500 million program approved in September 2021, which still had $125.6 million in unused authorization as of the mentioned date. It's important to note that this new share repurchase program encompasses any remaining unspent amount from the prior authorization, rather than being an additional allocation. The company has the flexibility to conduct share repurchases as deemed appropriate by management, whether through open market transactions (with or without a 10b5-1 plan) or via privately negotiated deals. There is no set expiration for the repurchase program, and it could be halted or concluded at any point in time.

news.headline: Student-loan borrowers to face impact of Education Department layoffs with over 400 employees affected.
Vasta reveals Q4 2024 figures; stay tuned for the numbers.
news.summary: A recent report released today indicated that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.8%. This marks a significant decrease from the previous month's rate of 5.2%. The report also showed that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the last month, surpassing analysts' expectations. Additionally, the average hourly wage saw a slight increase of 3.5%. Overall, the data suggests a positive trend in the labor market, indicating potential growth and stability in the economy.

news.headline: byNordic Acquisition Corp extends deadline with $40,312 deposit, allowing business combination until April 12, 2025.
news.summary: New York-based byNordic Acquisition Corporation, a special purpose acquisition company, has confirmed that they have deposited $40,312 into their trust account to extend the deadline for completing a business combination by an additional month. This move, known as the Extension, will push the deadline from March 12, 2025, to April 12, 2025. It marks the eighth extension out of a potential twelve allowed under the August 8, 2024, amendment to the Company’s Amended and Restated Certificate of Incorporation. This provision grants the Company's board of directors the authority to extend the termination date for one additional month each time at their discretion until either August 12, 2025, or the closure of their initial business combination.

news.headline: JK Moving's Eckert named Super Van Operator of the Year, company wins Fleet Safety Award at ATA's Moving and Storage Conference.
news.summary: In Sterling, Virginia, JK Moving was honored with two prestigious awards by the American Trucking Association. The awards were presented at the Moving and Storage Conference, where JK Moving received the Super Van Operator of the Year and Fleet Safety awards. This recognition highlights JK Moving's commitment to excellence in the industry.

news.headline: BRT Apartments Corp. files fourth quarter and full year 2024 financial statements on Form 10-K. Access info on investor relations website.
news.summary: In Great Neck, N.Y., on March 12, 2025, BRT Apartments Corp. (NYSE: BRT) confirmed the submission of its annual report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2024, to the Securities and Exchange Commission. Interested parties can view the financial statements and extra financial details on the firm's investor relations website in the "Financials – Quarterly Results" section.

news.headline: Lument Finance Trust (NYSE: LFT) to release 2025 earnings on March 19. Annual report on Form 10-K to be filed.
news.summary: In a recent statement, Lument Finance Trust, Inc. (NYSE: LFT) disclosed its plans to submit the Annual Report for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2025, to the Securities and Exchange Commission by March 19, 2025. The report will provide a comprehensive overview of the company's financial performance and strategic initiatives for the year. Shareholders and stakeholders can anticipate gaining valuable insights from the forthcoming Form 10-K filing, which is a regulatory requirement for publicly traded companies. Additionally, this submission will bolster transparency and accountability within the organization, ensuring adherence to reporting standards and regulations.

news.headline: KLX Energy Services Holdings, Inc. reported Q4 2024 results: revenue $709 million, net loss disclosed.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, KLX Energy Services Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: KLXE) released its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter ending December 31, 2024. The company reported that in the full year of 2024, they generated $709 million in revenue, but incurred a net loss in that time period.

news.headline: Clarkson University partners with NYISO and Avangrid to enhance power grid sustainability, reliability, capacity in Potsdam.
news.summary: In an effort to improve grid reliability, capacity, and sustainability, Clarkson University has partnered with the New York Independent System Operator (NYISO) and Avangrid for two new research projects. Set to begin in March 2025, the collaborations aim to bolster the grid's capabilities. This initiative highlights a joint effort to tackle crucial energy challenges.

news.headline: Dow Jones falls, while other indexes rise after inflation cools, with Nvidia and Tesla rallying. Cathie Wood invests in defense stock.
news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones experienced a decrease, while other indexes saw gains following indications of a reduction in inflation within the stock market. Notably, the Dow Jones gained momentum after an unexpected inflation data. Additionally, stocks like Nvidia and Tesla rallied as prominent investor Cathie Wood increased her investments in defense stocks.
